archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Professional, B2B SaaS variant)

typography.headings: Manrope or Satoshi (sans-serif, tracking-tight for large text). Never Inter/Roboto.
typography.body: Manrope or Inter (geometric sans for legibility)

layout.container: max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-6 py-8 md:px-8 md:py-10
layout.page_header: flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-start justify-between gap-4 mb-10
layout.group_header: flex items-center gap-3 py-4 mb-4 border-b border-zinc-100 mt-10 first:mt-0
layout.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6
layout.card: group relative flex flex-col bg-white rounded-xl border border-zinc-200 p-6 transition-all duration-200 hover:border-zinc-300 hover:shadow-[0_4px_20px_-4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] hover:-translate-y-0.5

card_sections.progress_section: flex flex-col gap-3 mt-auto pt-6 border-t border-zinc-100
card_sections.footer_affordance: mt-4 flex items-center text-sm font-medium text-blue-600 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200

components.Card: Use semantic HTML <article> or <div> with layout.card classes. Do not use heavy shadows. Rely on 1px crisp border and generous whitespace.
components.StatusBadge: Use inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
components.Avatar: size-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-semibold text-white shadow-sm
components.DropdownMenu: Use Shadcn DropdownMenu. Trigger is an icon button (size-8 rounded-md hover:bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-600 transition-colors)

micro_interactions.hover_card: Subtle Y-axis lift (-translate-y-0.5), border darkens slightly, shadow softly increases. 'View Details' link fades in.
micro_interactions.buttons: Standard scale down on active (active:scale-95), background color transition.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all month formatting uses 3-letters (e.g., 'Jun / 26' instead of 'June / 26'). Modify formatting logic accordingly.
Remove any colored left-borders from the cards. Rely purely on the StatusBadge and its subtle border for status indication to reduce visual noise.
Group headers should have a clear, crisp typographic hierarchy: Avatar, Full Name (text-lg font-medium), Plan Count (text-sm text-zinc-400).
The Progress bars should be super thin (h-1) and stacked vertically with tiny labels (text-[10px] uppercase) directly above them.
Maintain all 'data-testid' attributes required for testing.
For the 'Big target amount', use tracking-tighter for a crisp, financial look (e.g., text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tighter).
Use Manrope or Satoshi font for headings if possible; otherwise ensure standard geometric sans is used and explicitly set tracking-tight on large text.
Ensure the owner-name pill is subtle, e.g., text-xs bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-600 px-2 py-1 rounded-md.

empty_state.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-24 px-4 text-center rounded-xl border border-dashed border-zinc-200 bg-zinc-50/50
empty_state.title: text-lg font-medium text-zinc-900 mb-2
empty_state.action: Use the primary New Target Plan button here as well.
